infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Attendance uses the front camera to take the selfie that verifies it is really you when you check in.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Attendance needs access to your photos so you can choose an organization logo.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Attendance uses your location to confirm you are at your workplace when you check in.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Attendance uses your location in the background so you can be checked in and out automatically when you arrive at and leave your workplace.

plugins.cameraPermission: Attendance uses the front camera to take the selfie that verifies it is really you when you check in.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Attendance uses your location to confirm you are at your workplace when you check in.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Attendance uses your location in the background so you can be checked in and out automatically when you arrive at and leave your workplace.

plugins.photosPermission: Attendance needs access to your photos so you can choose an organization logo.
